rewrites.comment: SPA fallback. React Router owns the URL, so any path that isn't a real file must return index.html — otherwise refreshing on /students, or opening a shared link to a session, 404s. The (?!api/) exclusion lets API paths 404 honestly instead of returning HTML that the client then tries to parse as JSON.

headers.comment: Never cache the service worker or the manifest. If an old sw.js is cached, assistants keep running a stale app and stop receiving updates — which matters when the update fixes the scanner.
Fingerprinted build assets are immutable — the filename changes when the content does.
The scanner needs the camera; nothing else does, and no third party ever should.
